meta.title: Founding an AI Startup: Dos & Don'ts of Building a Company
meta.description:
Welcome, whether you're looking to found your first company or advance your current start-up this event is for you! You’ll learn tactical insights and hear stories from seasoned founders about building their own companies. Leave with concrete ways to start and grow your company and steps to becoming a founder.

We will be taking questions during the event. Please submit your question or upvote others' here: https://app.sli.do/event/qkJGhCKLTYY8DcdXdk3vqk/live/questions

Speakers: 
Seamus McAteer, Founder & CEO, SpeechLabs
https://www.linkedin.com/in/mcateer/

Priyansha Bagaria, Founder & CEO, Loopr AI
https://www.linkedin.com/in/priyanshabagaria/

Jason Brooks, Founder & CEO, Harkness.AI
https://www.linkedin.com/in/jason-brooks-97147b4/


Let us know how we're doing. We will be giving out discount codes for a selected number of people who fill out the survey: https://forms.gle/7R2Ct5o4w3dPqXDS7

Looking to connect with your peer learners, share projects, and swap advice? Join our AI community: 
https://community.deeplearning.ai/invites/ddzDLVa2jv

To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/
